mapper.update: UPDATE cafe_sales_daily SET order_count = order_count + #{orderCount}, total_amount = total_amount + #{totalAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE sales_date = #{salesDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cafe_sales_daily ( sales_date, order_count, total_amount, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{salesDate}, #{orderCount}, #{totalAmount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() )
mapper.select: SELECT sales_date AS salesDate, order_count AS orderCount, total_amount AS totalAmount FROM cafe_sales_daily ORDER BY sales_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT daily_target AS dailyTarget, monthly_target AS monthlyTarget FROM cafe_sales_targets WHERE id = 1
mapper.update: MERGE INTO cafe_sales_targets ( id, daily_target, monthly_target, updated_at ) KEY(id) VALUES ( 1, #{dailyTarget}, #{monthlyTarget}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() )
